ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported data */,
  "daily_change" INTEGER /* Daily change in cumulative total cases */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Positive rate of tests conducted */,
  "units" TEXT /* Type of units measured (e.g., tests performed) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_label" TEXT /* Label of the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes regarding the data entry */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Total cumulative cases reported as of the given date */,
  "cumulative_deaths" INTEGER /* Total cumulative deaths reported as of the given date */,
  "cumulative_recoveries" INTEGER /* Total cumulative recoveries reported as of the given date */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations reported on the given date */,
  "icu_cases" INTEGER /* Number of ICU cases reported on the given date */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated as of the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "health_care_spending" REAL /* Annual healthcare spending per capita in USD */,
  "total_vaccines_delivered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccines delivered to the country */,
  "total_vaccines_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccines administered in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source and its purpose */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality and reliability of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., government, NGO, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the testing data */,
  "tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases recorded */,
  "tests_per_thousand" REAL /* Number of tests conducted per thousand people */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Positive rate of tests conducted */,
  "testing_centers" INTEGER /* Number of testing centers in the country */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination data */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total doses administered */,
  "vaccinated_population" INTEGER /* Population that has received vaccinations */,
  "vaccines_delivered" INTEGER /* Number of vaccines delivered to the country */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated as of the given date */,
  "vaccination_centers" INTEGER /* Number of vaccination centers in the country */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting period */,
  "period_status" TEXT /* Status of the reporting period (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the reporting period */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the reporting period */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the role */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user account */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the user account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of operation performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, system alert) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the notification */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the notification */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
